title: Can struct variable name be the same as its struct type name?

features.name: typedef struct packed with struct literal assignment
features.description: Code should include a typedef struct packed definition followed by a struct literal assignment using braces
features.snippet:
typedef struct packed { logic [3:0] id; logic [7:0] addr; } Contact;
Contact = { 4'h2, 8'h9 };

features.name: variable declaration with same name as typedef struct type
features.description: Code should include a variable declaration where the identifier is identical to a typedef struct type name
features.snippet:
typedef struct packed { logic [3:0] id; logic [7:0] addr; } Contact;
Contact Contact;
